title: Scholarship Awards Committee Appointment
text:
Scholarship Awards Committee Appointment
Gibraltar Gazette No.5296, Government Notice No.214
In exercise of the powers conferred by regulation 5 of the Educational Awards Regulations, 1990, the
Government has appointed Mr Julian Saez to replace Mrs Kyran Roman who was appointed in Government
Notice No. 355 of Gazette No.5235 for the period set out therein.
Dated: 2nd April 2026
